name: Future value of an ordinary annuity
task: Create /tmp/eval_fva/fva.py with fv_annuity(payment, rate, periods) returning FV = payment * ((1+r)^n - 1) / r for r > 0; if r == 0, return payment * periods.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_fva/fva.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); F = mod.fv_annuity; assert abs(F(100, 0.05, 10) - 1257.78925) < 1e-3; assert abs(F(100, 0, 10) - 1000) < 1e-9; print('OK')
